_label_note: KR Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered KR resident-number shorthand/KR-BRN anchors, checksum-valid RRN/business-registration positives, negated no-executed-term-sheet wording, and public/stale percentage prose. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference. Post-AE/SA global precision realignment reconciled strict labels to current deterministic output after shared precision/name-parser fixes.

_agent_review.notes: Post-AE/SA global precision realignment: reconciled affected approved strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after shared suppressions/name parsing changed outputs. Covered hyphenated CN/HK/KR person-name spans, Secretariat role-mailbox suppression, phone-like CR/Iqama/National Address/device fragments, Hijri Sha-ban bait, public/HR spa-day bait, and identifier-like large-number suppressions; retained previous labels in ideal_must_detect where useful.
